title: Projects
subtitle: Each binding tells mcpmux which Space and feature set a folder routes into. Folders without a binding fall back to the default Space.
searchPlaceholder: Search by path, space, or feature set…

clearUnmapped.title: Clear unmapped folders
clearUnmapped.message_one: Remove {{count}} unmapped folder from this list. McpMux will offer to map it again the next time those apps report the folder.
clearUnmapped.message_other: Remove {{count}} unmapped folders from this list. McpMux will offer to map them again the next time those apps report the folder.
clearUnmapped.successHint: You'll be asked to map them again next time.

confirm.removeMessage: Sessions matching "{{path}}" will fall back to the default Space. You can recreate the binding anytime.

card.liveTooltip: A client is currently active in this folder
card.forgetRoot: Remove this unbound folder from the list
card.unboundTooltip: No binding matches this folder yet — a live session would be denied. Click to bind it to a FeatureSet.

machineIdentity.bannerMessage: This McpMux install has no machine identity. Name it to organize and filter your projects by machine.
machineIdentity.modalSubtitle: Give this McpMux instance a name so you can filter projects by machine.

panel.newSubtitle: Tell mcpmux how a folder should route.
panel.mappingSubtitleCreate: Pick the FeatureSet this folder routes through.
panel.mappingSubtitleLive: Configure routing for this live workspace.
panel.effectiveFeaturesSubtitle: Tools, prompts, and resources this folder currently sees

effective.sourceBindingTooltip: A workspace binding matched this folder — live sessions reporting it route here.
effective.sourceUnboundTooltip: No binding matches this folder. A live roots-capable session would be denied; the FeatureSet shown is a preview of what binding here would expose.
effective.noFeatures: No features configured in this feature set yet.

form.label: Label
form.labelHint: Friendly name shown instead of the folder path (optional).
form.iconHint: Set an emoji, or upload an image. Applies immediately for unmapped workspaces.
form.machineHint: Scope this binding to one machine, or leave global.
form.rootPlaceholder: Pick a folder, or paste an absolute path
form.spaceHint: Which Space this folder belongs to.
form.featureSetHint: Which tools this folder sees. Pick one or compose several — selected sets union into a single allow list.
form.noFeatureSets: No feature sets in that Space yet.
form.renderOrderTooltip: Render order — first FS rendered first; resolver merges all into one set.

errors.pickFeatureSet: Pick at least one feature set.

rootHint.reportedByClient: Reported by the connected client — the path isn't editable.
rootHint.idle: Click Browse to pick a folder, or paste an absolute path. Accepts /unix, C:\windows, and file:// forms.

empty.noMatchSubtitle: Try adjusting the search or filter.
empty.nothingSubtitle: When a connected MCP client reports a workspace root, it will appear here live. You can also add a binding ahead of time for a folder you care about.

sheet.titleCollision: Create a binding for this client
sheet.titleNew: This folder is using your Starter set
sheet.descCollision: This path is already bound for another MCP client. Save a client-scoped binding so this machine gets its own tool set.
sheet.descNew: You just opened this folder in a connected app. It's already configured with your default Starter tools. Pick a different Space or feature set below to change what it gets, or close to keep the Starter.
sheet.noFeatureSets: No feature sets in this space yet.
sheet.footer: You can change this anytime in Workspaces.
sheet.disablePrompt: Asked too often? Stop asking about new folders
sheet.disablePromptTitle: Turn off the new-folder prompt. Re-enable it anytime in Settings → Workspaces.
sheet.fsDefault: The auto-seeded fallback set for this space
sheet.machineDesc: Assign this client to a machine before mapping folders. Rohan and Gondor can then use different bindings for the same path.
